case_title: CAROL ANDERSON VS. ROGER MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, ROGER
ASSIGNED TO DEPT 604 FOR JURY TRIAL. CONTINUED TO OCT-16-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN 604.
JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER ROBERT BALIAN. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2002 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-15-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 604, DAVID BALLATI.

JURY TRIAL SET FOR OCT-16-2002 - COURT CONFERRED WITH BOTH PARTIES OFF THE RECORD. CONTINUED TO OCT-17-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN 604. JUDGE DAVID BALLATI. CLERK: BARBARA HING. REPORTER:SUSAN LEE
